papers.title: ActCam: Zero-Shot Joint Camera and 3D Motion Control for Video Generation
papers.abstract: For artistic applications, video generation requires fine-grained control over both performance and cinematography, i.e., the actor's motion and the camera trajectory. We present ActCam, a zero-shot method for video generation that jointly transfers character motion from a driving video into a new scene and enables per-frame control of intrinsic and extrinsic camera parameters. ActCam builds on any pretrained image-to-video diffusion model that accepts conditioning in terms of scene depth and character pose. Given a source video with a moving character and a target camera motion, ActCam generates pose and depth conditions that remain geometrically consistent across frames. We then run a single sampling process with a two-phase conditioning schedule: early denoising steps condition on both pose and sparse depth to enforce scene structure, after which depth is dropped and pose-only guidance refines high-frequency details without over-constraining the generation. We evaluate ActCam on multiple benchmarks spanning diverse character motions and challenging viewpoint changes. We find that, compared to pose-only control and other pose and camera methods, ActCam improves camera adherence and motion fidelity, and is preferred in human evaluations, especially under large viewpoint changes. Our results highlight that careful camera-consistent conditioning and staged guidance can enable strong joint camera and motion control without training. Project page: this https URL .

analysis.one_sentence_summary: ActCam 是一种零样本视频生成方法，能够联合控制角色运动与相机轨迹，无需额外训练。
analysis.problem: 现有视频生成方法难以同时精细控制角色运动和相机轨迹，尤其在视角大幅变化时缺乏几何一致性。
analysis.method: 基于预训练的图像到视频扩散模型，通过两阶段条件调度：早期去噪步骤同时使用姿态和稀疏深度条件以保持场景结构，后期仅用姿态条件细化高频细节。
contributions: 提出零样本联合控制角色运动和相机参数的方法，无需训练。
设计两阶段条件调度策略，平衡场景结构与细节生成。
在多个基准上验证，相比仅姿态控制和其他方法，在相机遵循度和运动保真度上更优。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到在多个基准上评估，并进行了人类偏好评估。
limitations: 依赖预训练模型的深度和姿态估计能力，可能受限于其泛化性。
两阶段调度中深度条件的丢弃可能导致复杂场景下的结构不一致。
analysis.relevance: 与视频生成方向直接相关，涉及扩散模型的条件控制。

papers.title: BAMI: Training-Free Bias Mitigation in GUI Grounding
papers.abstract: GUI grounding is a critical capability for enabling GUI agents to execute tasks such as clicking and dragging. However, in complex scenarios like the ScreenSpot-Pro benchmark, existing models often suffer from suboptimal performance. Utilizing the proposed \textbf{Masked Prediction Distribution (MPD)} attribution method, we identify that the primary sources of errors are twofold: high image resolution (leading to precision bias) and intricate interface elements (resulting in ambiguity bias). To address these challenges, we introduce \textbf{Bias-Aware Manipulation Inference (BAMI)}, which incorporates two key manipulations, coarse-to-fine focus and candidate selection, to effectively mitigate these biases. Our extensive experimental results demonstrate that BAMI significantly enhances the accuracy of various GUI grounding models in a training-free setting. For instance, applying our method to the TianXi-Action-7B model boosts its accuracy on the ScreenSpot-Pro benchmark from 51.9\% to 57.8\%. Furthermore, ablation studies confirm the robustness of the BAMI approach across diverse parameter configurations, highlighting its stability and effectiveness. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练的偏差感知操作推理方法BAMI，通过粗到细聚焦和候选选择缓解GUI grounding中的精度偏差和模糊偏差，显著提升模型在ScreenSpot-Pro基准上的准确率。
analysis.problem: GUI grounding在复杂场景下因高分辨率导致的精度偏差和复杂界面元素导致的模糊偏差，现有模型性能不佳。
analysis.method: 基于掩码预测分布归因方法识别偏差来源，提出BAMI方法，包含粗到细聚焦和候选选择两种操作，无需训练即可缓解偏差。
contributions: 提出掩码预测分布归因方法，识别GUI grounding中精度偏差和模糊偏差两大误差来源
提出无需训练的偏差感知操作推理方法BAMI，通过粗到细聚焦和候选选择有效缓解偏差
在ScreenSpot-Pro基准上验证BAMI能显著提升多种GUI grounding模型的准确率，例如TianXi-Action-7B从51.9%提升至57.8%
analysis.experiments: 在ScreenSpot-Pro基准上测试，TianXi-Action-7B模型准确率从51.9%提升至57.8%，消融实验验证了BAMI在不同参数配置下的鲁棒性。
limitations: 方法仅在GUI grounding任务上验证，可能不适用于其他视觉任务
依赖归因方法识别偏差，归因准确性可能影响最终效果
analysis.relevance: 与视觉-语言模型（VLM）中的GUI grounding任务相关，属于视觉理解方向。

papers.title: Relit-LiVE: Relight Video by Jointly Learning Environment Video
papers.abstract: Recent advances have shown that large-scale video diffusion models can be repurposed as neural renderers by first decomposing videos into intrinsic scene representations and then performing forward rendering under novel illumination. While promising, this paradigm fundamentally relies on accurate intrinsic decomposition, which remains highly unreliable for real-world videos and often leads to distorted appearances, broken materials, and accumulated temporal artifacts during relighting. In this work, we present Relit-LiVE, a novel video relighting framework that produces physically consistent, temporally stable results without requiring prior knowledge of camera pose. Our key insight is to explicitly introduce raw reference images into the rendering process, enabling the model to recover critical scene cues that are inevitably lost or corrupted in intrinsic representations. Furthermore, we propose a novel environment video prediction formulation that simultaneously generates relit videos and per-frame environment maps aligned with each camera viewpoint in a single diffusion process. This joint prediction enforces strong geometric-illumination alignment and naturally supports dynamic lighting and camera motion, significantly improving physical consistency in video relighting while easing the requirement of known per-frame camera pose. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Relit-LiVE consistently outperforms state-of-the-art video relighting and neural rendering methods across synthetic and real-world benchmarks. Beyond relighting, our framework naturally supports a wide range of downstream applications, including scene-level rendering, material editing, object insertion, and streaming video relighting. The Project is available at this https URL .

analysis.one_sentence_summary: Relit-LiVE 提出一种无需相机位姿先验的视频重光照框架，通过联合学习环境视频和引入原始参考图像，实现物理一致且时间稳定的重光照效果。
analysis.problem: 现有基于视频扩散模型的重光照方法依赖不稳定的内在分解，导致真实视频重光照时出现外观扭曲、材质破损和时间伪影。
analysis.method: 在渲染过程中显式引入原始参考图像以恢复丢失的场景线索，并联合预测重光照视频和每帧环境贴图，通过单一扩散过程实现几何-光照对齐。
contributions: 提出无需相机位姿先验的视频重光照框架，通过引入原始参考图像提升物理一致性
提出环境视频预测公式，联合生成重光照视频和逐帧环境贴图，支持动态光照和相机运动
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实基准上，Relit-LiVE 一致优于最先进的视频重光照和神经渲染方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量原始参考图像，在极端退化场景下效果受限
环境视频预测的计算开销可能较大，影响实时应用
analysis.relevance: 与视频生成相关，属于生成模型在视频重光照任务上的应用。

papers.title: Are We Making Progress in Multimodal Domain Generalization? A Comprehensive Benchmark Study
papers.abstract: Despite the growing popularity of Multimodal Domain Generalization (MMDG) for enhancing model robustness, it remains unclear whether reported performance gains reflect genuine algorithmic progress or are artifacts of inconsistent evaluation protocols. Current research is fragmented, with studies varying significantly across datasets, modality configurations, and experimental settings. Furthermore, existing benchmarks focus predominantly on action recognition, often neglecting critical real-world challenges such as input corruptions, missing modalities, and model trustworthiness. This lack of standardization obscures a reliable assessment of the field's advancement. To address this issue, we introduce MMDG-Bench, the first unified and comprehensive benchmark for MMDG, which standardizes evaluation across six datasets spanning three diverse tasks: action recognition, mechanical fault diagnosis, and sentiment analysis. MMDG-Bench encompasses six modality combinations, nine representative methods, and multiple evaluation settings. Beyond standard accuracy, it systematically assesses corruption robustness, missing-modality generalization, misclassification detection, and out-of-distribution detection. With 7, 402 neural networks trained in total across 95 unique cross-domain tasks, MMDG-Bench yields five key findings: (1) under fair comparisons, recent specialized MMDG methods offer only marginal improvements over ERM baseline; (2) no single method consistently outperforms others across datasets or modality combinations; (3) a substantial gap to upper-bound performance persists, indicating that MMDG remains far from solved; (4) trimodal fusion does not consistently outperform the strongest bimodal configurations; and (5) all evaluated methods exhibit significant degradation under corruption and missing-modality scenarios, with some methods further compromising model trustworthiness.

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文提出首个统一的多模态域泛化基准MMDG-Bench，通过标准化评估发现现有方法提升有限且存在鲁棒性不足等问题。
analysis.problem: 多模态域泛化领域缺乏标准化评估协议，现有研究在数据集、模态配置和实验设置上差异大，导致难以判断算法真实进展。
analysis.method: 构建统一基准MMDG-Bench，涵盖6个数据集、3类任务、6种模态组合、9种代表性方法，系统评估标准准确率、鲁棒性、缺失模态泛化、误分类检测和分布外检测。
contributions: 提出首个统一的多模态域泛化基准MMDG-Bench
通过大规模实验（7402个神经网络、95个跨域任务）揭示五个关键发现
analysis.experiments: 在6个数据集（动作识别、机械故障诊断、情感分析）上评估9种方法，训练7402个神经网络，涵盖95个跨域任务，评估标准准确率、鲁棒性、缺失模态泛化、误分类检测和分布外检测。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有多模态域泛化场景
未提出新的算法改进
analysis.relevance: 与视觉-语言模型（VLM）的多模态域泛化评估相关，可指导VLM在真实场景下的鲁棒性研究。

papers.title: DPM++: Dynamic Masked Metric Learning for Occluded Person Re-identification
papers.abstract: Although person re-identification has made impressive progress, occlusion caused by obstacles remains an unsettled issue in real applications. The difficulty lies in the mismatch between incomplete occluded samples and holistic identity representations. Severe occlusion removes discriminative body cues and introduces interference from background clutter and occluders, making global metric learning unreliable. Existing methods mainly rely on extra pre-trained models to estimate visible parts for alignment or construct occluded samples via data augmentation, but still lack a unified framework that learns robust visibility-consistent matching under realistic occlusion patterns. In this paper, we propose DPM++, a Dynamic Masked Metric Learning framework for occluded person re-identification. DPM++ learns an input-adaptive masked metric that dynamically selects reliable identity subspaces for each occluded instance, enabling matching to emphasize visibility-consistent evidence while suppressing unreliable components. Built upon the classifier-prototype space, DPM++ introduces a CLIP-based two-stage supervision scheme, where ID-level semantic priors are learned from the text branch and transferred into the classifier-prototype space for dynamic masked matching. To strengthen the masked metric, we introduce a saliency-guided patch transfer strategy to synthesize controllable and photo-realistic occluded samples during training. Exploiting real scene priors, this strategy exposes the model to realistic partial observations and provides richer supervision than random erasing. In addition, occlusion-aware sample pairing and mask-guided optimization improve the stability and effectiveness of the framework. Experiments on occluded and holistic person re-identification benchmarks show that DPM++ consistently outperforms previous state-of-the-art methods in both holistic and occlusion scenarios.

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态掩码度量学习框架DPM++，通过自适应选择可靠身份子空间和CLIP引导的两阶段监督，解决遮挡行人重识别中的可见性不一致匹配问题。
analysis.problem: 遮挡导致行人图像不完整，全局度量学习不可靠，现有方法依赖额外预训练模型或数据增强，缺乏统一框架处理真实遮挡模式下的鲁棒匹配。
analysis.method: DPM++框架：在分类器-原型空间中学习输入自适应的动态掩码度量，利用CLIP文本分支传递ID级语义先验；引入显著性引导的块迁移策略合成可控逼真遮挡样本；采用遮挡感知样本配对和掩码引导优化。
contributions: 提出动态掩码度量学习框架，自适应选择可靠身份子空间进行遮挡匹配
引入CLIP两阶段监督，将文本语义先验迁移到分类器-原型空间
设计显著性引导的块迁移策略，生成真实遮挡样本增强训练
analysis.experiments: 在遮挡和整体行人重识别基准上，DPM++在整体和遮挡场景下均一致优于先前最先进方法。
limitations: 依赖CLIP模型，可能引入额外计算开销
块迁移策略可能不适用于极端遮挡或复杂背景
analysis.relevance: 与视觉-语言模型（VLM）相关，利用CLIP进行语义监督

papers.title: DINORANKCLIP: DINOv3 Distillation and Injection for Vision-Language Pretraining with High-Order Ranking Consistency
papers.abstract: Contrastive language-image pretraining (CLIP) suffers from two structural weaknesses: the symmetric InfoNCE loss discards the relative ordering among unmatched in-batch pairs, and global pooling collapses the visual representation into a semantic bottleneck that is poorly sensitive to fine-grained local structure. RANKCLIP partially addresses the first issue with a list-wise Plackett-Luce ranking-consistency loss, but its model is strictly first-order and inherits the second weakness untouched. We propose DINORANKCLIP, a pretraining framework that addresses both jointly. Our principal contribution is injecting a frozen DINOv3 teacher into the contrastive trunk through a dual-branch lightweight student and a multi-scale fusion module with channel-spatial attention, a self-attention refiner, and a conflict-aware gate that preserves the cross-modal alignment up to first order. Complementarily, we introduce a high-order Plackett-Luce ranking model in which the per-position utility is augmented with attention-parameterised pairwise and tuple-wise transition terms; the family contains CLIP and RANKCLIP as nested zero-order and first-order special cases, and the optimal order on every benchmark is $R^*=3$. The full empirical study -- order sweep, Fine-grained Probe on five datasets, four-node Modality-Gap analysis, six-variant Fusion ablation -- fits in 72 hours on a single eight-GPU H100 node and trains entirely on Conceptual Captions 3M. DINORANKCLIP consistently outperforms CLIP, CyCLIP, ALIP, and RANKCLIP under matched compute, with the largest relative gains on the fine-grained and out-of-distribution evaluations that most directly stress local structural reasoning.

analysis.one_sentence_summary: DINORANKCLIP通过注入冻结的DINOv3教师和引入高阶排序一致性损失，同时解决了CLIP中对称InfoNCE损失忽略负样本排序和全局池化丢失细粒度局部结构的问题。
analysis.problem: CLIP存在两个结构弱点：对称InfoNCE损失丢弃了批次内不匹配样本对的相对排序，以及全局池化将视觉表示压缩为对细粒度局部结构不敏感的语义瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出DINORANKCLIP框架，主要贡献是向对比主干注入冻结的DINOv3教师，通过双分支轻量学生网络和多尺度融合模块（含通道-空间注意力、自注意力精炼器和冲突感知门）保持一阶跨模态对齐；同时引入高阶Plackett-Luce排序模型，其中每位置效用通过注意力参数化的成对和元组转移项增强，最优阶数为R*=3。
contributions: 提出DINORANKCLIP框架，联合解决CLIP的两个结构弱点
引入高阶Plackett-Luce排序一致性损失，包含注意力参数化的成对和元组转移项
通过双分支轻量学生网络和多尺度融合模块注入冻结的DINOv3教师，保持一阶跨模态对齐
analysis.experiments: 在Conceptual Captions 3M上训练，单节点8 GPU H100耗时72小时。进行了阶数扫描、五个数据集上的细粒度探测、四节点模态间隙分析、六变体融合消融实验。DINORANKCLIP在匹配计算量下一致优于CLIP、CyCLIP、ALIP和RANKCLIP，在细粒度和分布外评估上相对增益最大。
limitations: 依赖冻结的DINOv3教师，可能限制学生网络学习新特征的能力
高阶排序模型增加了计算复杂度，可能影响训练效率
analysis.relevance: 与视觉-语言模型（VLM）预训练直接相关，可提升细粒度理解和分布外泛化能力。

papers.title: Solving Minimal Problems Without Matrix Inversion Using FFT-Based Interpolation
papers.abstract: Estimating camera geometry typically involves solving minimal problems formulated as systems of multivariate polynomial equations, which often pose computational challenges when using existing Gröbner-basis or resultant-based methods due to matrix inversion needed in the online solver. Here we propose a sampling-based, matrix inversion-free method that constructs the solvers using sparse hidden-variable resultants. The determinant polynomial in the hidden variable is efficiently reconstructed via inverse fast Fourier transform interpolation from sampled evaluations, avoiding symbolic expansion. Solving this polynomial yields the hidden variable, and the remaining unknowns are recovered by identifying rank-1 deficient submatrices and applying Cramer's rule. A greatest common divisor-based criterion ensures robust submatrix identification under noise. Experiments on diverse minimal problems demonstrate that the proposed solver achieves strong numerical stability and competitive runtime, particularly for small-scale problems, providing a practical alternative to traditional Gröbner-basis and resultant-based solvers.

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于FFT插值的无矩阵求逆方法，用于高效求解相机几何估计中的最小问题。
analysis.problem: 传统基于Gröbner基或结式的方法在求解最小问题时需要矩阵求逆，计算成本高。
analysis.method: 采用稀疏隐变量结式，通过逆快速傅里叶变换插值从采样评估中重构行列式多项式，避免符号展开；利用秩1缺陷子矩阵和Cramer法则恢复未知数，并基于最大公约数准则实现鲁棒子矩阵识别。
contributions: 提出无矩阵求逆的采样求解方法，降低计算复杂度
利用FFT插值高效重构隐变量结式的行列式多项式
引入GCD准则增强噪声下子矩阵识别的鲁棒性
analysis.experiments: 在多种最小问题上实验，表明所提求解器数值稳定性强，小规模问题运行时竞争力好。
limitations: 可能对大规模问题效率提升有限
依赖采样和插值，精度受采样密度影响
analysis.relevance: 与视觉几何估计相关，但与VLM/视频生成/医学影像/LLM训练无直接关系。

papers.title: MedHorizon: Towards Long-context Medical Video Understanding in the Wild
papers.abstract: Medical multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have advanced image understanding and short-video analysis, but real clinical review often requires full-procedure video understanding. Unlike general long videos, medical procedures contain highly redundant anatomical views, while decisive evidence is temporally sparse, spatially subtle, and context dependent. Existing benchmarks often assume this evidence has already been localized through images, short clips, or pre-segmented videos, leaving the retrieval-before-reasoning problem under-tested. We introduce MedHorizon, an in-the-wild benchmark for long-context medical video understanding. MedHorizon preserves 759 hours of full-length clinical procedures and provides 1,253 evidence-grounded multiple-choice questionsthat jointly evaluate sparse evidence understanding and multi-hop clinical reasoning. Its evidence is extremely sparse, with only 0.166% evidence frames on average, requiring models to search noisy procedural streams before interpreting and aggregating findings. We evaluate representative general-domain, medical-domain, and long-video MLLMs. The best model reaches only 41.1% accuracy, showing that current systems remain far from robust full-procedure understanding. Further analysis yields four key findings: performance does not scale reliably with more frames, evidence retrieval and clinical interpretation remain primary bottlenecks; these bottlenecks are rooted in weak procedural reasoning and attention drift under redundancy, and generic sampling methods only partially balances local detail with global coverage. MedHorizon provides a rigorous testbed for MLLMs that retrieve sparse evidence and reason over complete clinical workflows.

analysis.one_sentence_summary: MedHorizon 是一个用于评估长上下文医学视频理解能力的基准，包含759小时完整临床手术视频和1253个基于证据的多选题，揭示了现有模型在稀疏证据检索和临床推理上的严重不足。
analysis.problem: 现有医学多模态大模型主要处理图像和短视频，缺乏对完整临床手术视频的长上下文理解能力，且现有基准假设证据已被定位，未充分测试检索-推理问题。
analysis.method: 构建 MedHorizon 基准，包含759小时完整临床手术视频和1253个基于证据的多选题，证据帧平均仅占0.166%，要求模型在噪声流程中检索稀疏证据并进行多跳临床推理。
contributions: 提出了首个面向野外长上下文医学视频理解的基准 MedHorizon
通过1253个基于证据的多选题联合评估稀疏证据理解和多跳临床推理
揭示了当前模型在完整手术视频理解上的瓶颈：证据检索和临床解释
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到最佳模型准确率仅41.1%，并给出四个关键发现。
limitations: 基准仅包含手术视频，可能不覆盖其他医学视频类型
多选题形式可能无法完全反映真实临床决策的复杂性
analysis.relevance: 与视觉-语言模型（VLM/MLLM）、长视频理解、医学影像分析、多模态推理等方向密切相关。

papers.title: Sparkle: Realizing Lively Instruction-Guided Video Background Replacement via Decoupled Guidance
papers.abstract: In recent years, open-source efforts like Senorita-2M have propelled video editing toward natural language instruction. However, current publicly available datasets predominantly focus on local editing or style transfer, which largely preserve the original scene structure and are easier to scale. In contrast, Background Replacement, a task central to creative applications such as film production and advertising, requires synthesizing entirely new, temporally consistent scenes while maintaining accurate foreground-background interactions, making large-scale data generation significantly more challenging. Consequently, this complex task remains largely underexplored due to a scarcity of high-quality training data. This gap is evident in poorly performing state-of-the-art models, e.g., Kiwi-Edit, because the primary open-source dataset that contains this task, i.e., OpenVE-3M, frequently produces static, unnatural backgrounds. In this paper, we trace this quality degradation to a lack of precise background guidance during data synthesis. Accordingly, we design a scalable pipeline that generates foreground and background guidance in a decoupled manner with strict quality filtering. Building on this pipeline, we introduce Sparkle, a dataset of ~140K video pairs spanning five common background-change themes, alongside Sparkle-Bench, the largest evaluation benchmark tailored for background replacement to date. Experiments demonstrate that our dataset and the model trained on it achieve substantially better performance than all existing baselines on both OpenVE-Bench and Sparkle-Bench. Our proposed dataset, benchmark, and model are fully open-sourced at this https URL .

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文提出Sparkle数据集和模型，通过解耦引导实现指令驱动的视频背景替换，显著优于现有方法。
analysis.problem: 视频背景替换任务因缺乏高质量训练数据而未被充分探索，现有数据集生成的背景静态且不自然。
analysis.method: 设计可扩展的数据合成流水线，以解耦方式生成前景和背景引导，并经过严格质量过滤，构建Sparkle数据集和Sparkle-Bench基准。
contributions: 提出Sparkle数据集，包含约14万视频对，覆盖五种常见背景更换主题
构建Sparkle-Bench，目前最大的视频背景替换评估基准
开源数据集、基准和模型，实验表明在OpenVE-Bench和Sparkle-Bench上均显著优于现有基线
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅说明模型在OpenVE-Bench和Sparkle-Bench上优于所有现有基线。
limitations: 数据集规模有限（约14万对），可能无法覆盖所有复杂场景
解耦引导流水线可能依赖特定质量过滤阈值，泛化性需进一步验证
analysis.relevance: 与视频生成、视觉-语言模型（VLM）相关，涉及指令引导的视频编辑。

papers.title: DCR: Counterfactual Attractor Guidance for Rare Compositional Generation
papers.abstract: Diffusion models generate realistic visual content, yet often fail to produce rare but plausible compositions. When prompted with combinations that are valid but underrepresented in training data, such as a snowy beach or a rainbow at night, the generation process frequently collapses toward more common alternatives. We identify this failure mode as default completion bias, where denoising trajectories are implicitly attracted toward high-frequency semantic configurations. Existing guidance mechanisms do not explicitly model this competing tendency and therefore struggle to prevent such collapse. We introduce Default Completion Repulsion (DCR), a training-free framework that explicitly models and suppresses default completion behavior. DCR constructs a counterfactual attractor by relaxing the rare compositional factor while preserving surrounding semantics, inducing an alternative denoising trajectory reflecting the model's preferred completion. We define the discrepancy between target and attractor trajectories as a counterfactual drift, and propose a projection-based repulsion mechanism that removes guidance components aligned with this drift direction. This suppresses undesired frequent completions while preserving other semantic components. DCR operates entirely within the standard diffusion sampling process without retraining or architectural modification. Experiments on rare compositional prompts show that DCR improves compositional fidelity while maintaining visual quality. Our analysis further shows that the framework exposes and counteracts intrinsic model biases, offering a new perspective on controllable generation beyond explicit constraint enforcement.

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出默认完成排斥（DCR）框架，通过反事实吸引子投影排斥机制抑制扩散模型中的默认完成偏差，实现稀有组合生成。
analysis.problem: 扩散模型在生成稀有但合理的组合（如雪地海滩、夜晚彩虹）时，由于默认完成偏差，倾向于生成高频语义配置，导致组合失败。
analysis.method: 构建反事实吸引子，通过放松稀有组合因子并保留周围语义，诱导出反映模型偏好完成的替代去噪轨迹；定义目标轨迹与吸引子轨迹的差异为反事实漂移，并采用基于投影的排斥机制移除与该漂移方向对齐的引导成分，从而抑制不期望的频繁完成。
contributions: 识别并命名了扩散模型中的默认完成偏差问题
提出无需重新训练或修改架构的DCR框架，通过反事实吸引子和投影排斥机制有效抑制默认完成偏差
实验证明DCR在稀有组合提示下提高了组合保真度并保持视觉质量
analysis.experiments: 在稀有组合提示上进行实验，结果显示DCR提高了组合保真度并保持了视觉质量。
limitations: 可能依赖反事实吸引子的构建质量
未在多种扩散模型架构上验证泛化性
analysis.relevance: 与生成模型（尤其是扩散模型）的可控生成和偏差校正相关，可应用于视觉-语言模型中的组合生成任务。

papers.title: FreeSpec: Training-Free Long Video Generation via Singular-Spectrum Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Video diffusion models perform well in short-video synthesis, but their training-free extension to long videos often suffers from content drift, temporal inconsistency, and over-smoothed dynamics. Existing methods improve temporal consistency by combining a global branch with a local branch, but they often further decompose appearance consistency and temporal dynamics within each branch using predefined criteria. This assignment is unreliable when appearance and action progression are tightly coupled, such as in camera motion and sequential motion. We analyze the video temporal extension issue from a singular-spectrum perspective and show that enlarged self-attention windows induce spectral concentration: spectral energy becomes dominated by a few low-rank singular directions, preserving coarse structure but suppressing high-rank spatial details and motion-rich temporal variations. To mitigate this problem, we propose FreeSpec, a training-free spectral reconstruction framework for long-video generation. FreeSpec decomposes global and local features with singular value decomposition, and uses the global branch as low-rank spectral guidance and the local branch as a high-rank reconstruction basis. This spectrum-level fusion avoids the rigid feature partitioning of previous decomposition rules, preserving long-range consistency while better retaining spatial details and temporal dynamics. Experiments on Wan2.1 and LTX-Video demonstrate that FreeSpec improves long-video generation, especially for temporal dynamics, while maintaining strong visual quality and temporal consistency. Project demo: this https URL .

analysis.one_sentence_summary: FreeSpec 提出一种无需训练的频谱重建框架，通过奇异值分解融合全局和局部特征，解决长视频生成中的内容漂移和时间不一致问题。
analysis.problem: 现有视频扩散模型在无训练扩展至长视频时，存在内容漂移、时间不一致和动态过度平滑的问题，且全局与局部分支的刚性特征划分在动作与外观紧密耦合时不可靠。
analysis.method: 从奇异谱角度分析问题，提出 FreeSpec 框架：利用奇异值分解将全局和局部特征分解，全局分支作为低秩谱指导，局部分支作为高秩重建基，实现谱级融合。
contributions: 从奇异谱视角揭示了长视频生成中自注意力窗口扩大导致谱能量集中的问题
提出 FreeSpec，一种无需训练的谱重建框架，通过谱级融合避免刚性特征划分
在 Wan2.1 和 LTX-Video 上验证了方法在保持视觉质量和时间一致性的同时提升时间动态
analysis.experiments: 在 Wan2.1 和 LTX-Video 上实验，FreeSpec 改进了长视频生成，特别是时间动态，同时保持强视觉质量和时间一致性。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练模型的奇异谱特性，泛化性需进一步验证
未讨论计算开销，谱分解可能增加推理时间
analysis.relevance: 与视频生成方向直接相关，涉及扩散模型的无训练扩展和时序一致性，与 VLM 的视觉理解有间接关联。

papers.title: MARBLE: Multi-Aspect Reward Balance for Diffusion RL
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning fine-tuning has become the dominant approach for aligning diffusion models with human preferences. However, assessing images is intrinsically a multi-dimensional task, and multiple evaluation criteria need to be optimized simultaneously. Existing practice deal with multiple rewards by training one specialist model per reward, optimizing a weighted-sum reward $R(x)=\sum_k w_k R_k(x)$, or sequentially fine-tuning with a hand-crafted stage schedule. These approaches either fail to produce a unified model that can be jointly trained on all rewards or necessitates heavy manually tuned sequential training. We find that the failure stems from using a naive weighted-sum reward aggregation. This approach suffers from a sample-level mismatch because most rollouts are specialist samples, highly informative for certain reward dimensions but irrelevant for others; consequently, weighted summation dilutes their supervision. To address this issue, we propose MARBLE (Multi-Aspect Reward BaLancE), a gradient-space optimization framework that maintains independent advantage estimators for each reward, computes per-reward policy gradients, and harmonizes them into a single update direction without manually-tuned reward weighting, by solving a Quadratic Programming problem. We further propose an amortized formulation that exploits the affine structure of the loss used in DiffusionNFT, to reduce the per-step cost from K+1 backward passes to near single-reward baseline cost, together with EMA smoothing on the balancing coefficients to stabilize updates against transient single-batch fluctuations. On SD3.5 Medium with five rewards, MARBLE improves all five reward dimensions simultaneously, turns the worst-aligned reward's gradient cosine from negative under weighted summation in 80% of mini-batches to consistently positive, and runs at 0.97X the training speed of baseline training.

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MARBLE框架，通过梯度空间优化平衡多奖励信号，实现扩散模型的多维度对齐。
analysis.problem: 现有扩散模型强化学习微调中，多奖励优化存在样本级不匹配问题，加权求和或顺序微调难以有效联合训练。
analysis.method: 为每个奖励维护独立优势估计器，计算各奖励策略梯度，通过二次规划求解统一更新方向，并采用摊销公式和EMA平滑降低计算成本。
contributions: 提出梯度空间优化框架MARBLE，无需手动调权即可平衡多奖励。
设计摊销公式将每步反向传播次数从K+1降至接近单奖励基线。
在SD3.5 Medium上五个奖励维度同时提升，训练速度达基线0.97倍。
analysis.experiments: 在SD3.5 Medium上使用五个奖励进行实验，所有奖励维度同时提升，最差对齐奖励的梯度余弦从80%小批量负值转为持续正值，训练速度为基线0.97倍。
limitations: 可能依赖奖励函数的设计质量。
二次规划求解可能带来额外计算开销。
analysis.relevance: 与扩散模型对齐、多目标优化相关，可应用于图像生成、视频生成等生成模型。

papers.title: 3D MRI Image Pretraining via Controllable 2D Slice Navigation Task
papers.abstract: Self-supervised pretraining has become the mainstream approach for learning MRI representations from unlabeled scans. However, most existing objectives still treat each scan primarily as static aggregations of slices, patches or volumes. We ask whether there exists an intrinsic form of self-supervision signal that is different from reconstructing the masked patches, through transforming the 3D volumes into controllable 2D rendered sequences: by rendering slices at continuous positions, orientations, and scales, a 3D volume can be converted into dense video-action sequences whose controls are the action trajectories. We study this formulation with an action-conditioned pretraining objective, where a tokenizer encodes slice observations and a latent dynamics model predicts the evolution of latent features. Across representative anatomical and spatial downstream tasks, the proposed pretraining is evaluated against standard static-volume baselines, tokenizer-only pretraining, and dynamics variants without aligned actions. These results suggest that controllable MRI slice navigation provides a useful complementary pretraining interface for learning anatomical and spatial representations from large unlabeled MRI collections.

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于可控2D切片导航的自监督预训练方法，将3D MRI体积转化为可控制的视频动作序列，用于学习解剖和空间表示。
analysis.problem: 现有自监督预训练方法将MRI扫描视为静态切片、块或体积的聚合，缺乏利用内在自监督信号的新形式。
analysis.method: 通过渲染连续位置、方向和尺度的切片，将3D体积转化为可控的2D视频动作序列，并采用动作条件预训练目标，包括切片编码器和潜在动力学模型。
contributions: 提出将3D MRI体积转化为可控2D切片导航序列的新预训练范式
设计动作条件预训练目标，结合切片编码器和潜在动力学模型
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及在解剖和空间下游任务中与多种基线对比，表明该方法有效。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量切片渲染和动作控制
潜在动力学模型可能难以捕捉复杂解剖结构
analysis.relevance: 与视频生成（可控序列）、医学影像（MRI预训练）相关，但与VLM/LLM训练无直接关系。

papers.title: GeoStack: A Framework for Quasi-Abelian Knowledge Composition in VLMs
papers.abstract: We address the challenge of knowledge composition in Vision-Language Models (VLMs), where accumulating expertise across multiple domains or tasks typically leads to catastrophic forgetting. We introduce GeoStack (Geometric Stacking), a modular framework that allows independently trained domain experts to be composed into a unified model. By imposing geometric and structural constraints on the adapter manifold, GeoStack ensures the foundational knowledge of the base model is preserved. Furthermore, we mathematically demonstrate a weight-folding property that achieves constant-time inference complexity ($O(1)$), regardless of the number of integrated experts. Experimental results across multi-domain adaptation and class-incremental learning show that GeoStack provides an efficient mechanism for long-term knowledge composition while significantly mitigating catastrophic forgetting. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.one_sentence_summary: GeoStack 提出一种模块化框架，通过几何约束实现视觉-语言模型中多领域专家知识的无损组合，并保持恒定推理复杂度。
analysis.problem: 视觉-语言模型在积累多领域或多任务知识时面临灾难性遗忘问题。
analysis.method: 提出 GeoStack 框架，通过几何堆叠（Geometric Stacking）对适配器流形施加几何与结构约束，保留基模型知识，并利用权重折叠性质实现恒定推理复杂度。
contributions: 提出 GeoStack 模块化框架，支持独立训练的领域专家组合成统一模型。
数学证明权重折叠性质，实现与专家数量无关的恒定推理复杂度 O(1)。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于适配器形式的专家组合，对全模型微调场景不适用。
几何约束可能限制专家间的交互灵活性。
analysis.relevance: 与视觉-语言模型（VLM）的知识组合与持续学习相关。

papers.title: FREPix: Frequency-Heterogeneous Flow Matching for Pixel-Space Image Generation
papers.abstract: Pixel-space diffusion has re-emerged as a promising alternative to latent-space generation because it avoids the representation bottleneck introduced by VAEs. Yet most existing methods still treat image generation as a frequency-homogeneous process, overlooking the distinct roles and learning dynamics of low- and high-frequency components. To address this, we propose FREPix, a FREquency-heterogeneous flow matching framework for Pixel-space image generation. FREPix explicitly decomposes generation into low- and high-frequency components, assigns them separate transport paths, predicts them with a factorized network, and trains them with a frequency-aware objective. In this way, coarse-to-fine generation becomes an explicit design principle rather than an implicit behavior. On ImageNet class-to-image generation, FREPix achieves competitive results among pixel-space generation models, reaching 1.91 FID at $256\times256$ and 2.38 FID at $512\times512$, with particularly strong behavior in the low-NFE regime.

analysis.one_sentence_summary: FREPix提出了一种频率异质流匹配框架，将像素空间图像生成显式分解为低频和高频分量，实现从粗到细的生成。
analysis.problem: 现有像素空间扩散方法将图像生成视为频率同质过程，忽略了低频和高频分量的不同作用和学习动态。
analysis.method: 将生成显式分解为低频和高频分量，分配独立传输路径，使用分解网络预测，并采用频率感知目标训练。
contributions: 提出频率异质流匹配框架，显式实现从粗到细的生成。
在ImageNet类条件生成上达到竞争性FID（256×256: 1.91, 512×512: 2.38），尤其在低NFE下表现突出。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet类条件图像生成任务上评估，256×256分辨率下FID为1.91，512×512下FID为2.38，低NFE下表现优异。
limitations: 可能依赖特定频率分解策略，泛化性待验证。
仅针对像素空间生成，未探讨在潜在空间或其他任务上的适用性。
analysis.relevance: 与生成模型（尤其是扩散/流匹配模型）相关，可启发视频生成或医学图像生成中的频率感知设计。

papers.title: Reconstruction or Semantics? What Makes a Latent Space Useful for Robotic World Models
papers.abstract: World model-based policy evaluation is a practical proxy for testing real-world robot control by rolling out candidate actions in action-conditioned video diffusion models. As these models increasingly adopt latent diffusion modeling (LDM), choosing the right latent space becomes critical. While the status quo uses autoencoding latent spaces like VAEs that are primarily trained for pixel reconstruction, recent work suggests benefits from pretrained encoders with representation-aligned semantic latent spaces. We systematically evaluate these latent spaces for action-conditioned LDM by comparing six reconstruction and semantic encoders to train world model variants under a fixed protocol on BridgeV2 dataset, and show effective world model training in high-dimensional representation spaces with and without dimension compression. We then propose three axes to assess robotic world model performance: visual fidelity, planning and downstream policy performance, and latent representation quality. Our results show visual fidelity alone is insufficient for world model selection. While reconstruction encoders like VAE and Cosmos achieve strong pixel-level scores, semantic encoders such as V-JEPA 2.1 (strongest overall on policy), Web-DINO, and SigLIP 2 generally excel across the other two axes at all model scales. Our study advocates semantic latent space as stronger foundation for policy-relevant robotics diffusion world models.

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文系统比较了重建型与语义型潜空间在机器人世界模型中的效果，发现语义潜空间在策略相关任务上表现更优。
analysis.problem: 在基于潜扩散模型的世界模型中，选择何种潜空间（重建型还是语义型）对机器人策略评估更有效。
analysis.method: 在BridgeV2数据集上，使用固定协议训练六种编码器（重建型与语义型）的动作条件潜扩散模型，并从视觉保真度、规划与下游策略性能、潜表示质量三个维度评估。
contributions: 系统比较了重建型与语义型潜空间在机器人世界模型中的表现
提出三个评估维度：视觉保真度、规划与策略性能、潜表示质量
发现语义潜空间（如V-JEPA 2.1）在策略相关任务上优于重建型潜空间
analysis.experiments: 在BridgeV2数据集上，使用固定协议训练六种编码器的世界模型变体，并评估三个维度的性能。摘要未提供具体实验结果数值。
limitations: 仅基于BridgeV2数据集，可能缺乏泛化性
未讨论不同编码器计算效率的差异
analysis.relevance: 与视频生成（动作条件视频扩散模型）和机器人策略学习相关，间接涉及视觉-语言模型（如Web-DINO、SigLIP 2）的应用。
analysis.sub_area: 机器人世界模型与视频生成

papers.title: Empirical Evidence for Simply Connected Decision Regions in Image Classifiers
papers.abstract: Understanding the topology of decision regions is central to explaining the inner workings of deep neural networks. Prior empirical work has provided evidence that these regions are path connected. We study a stronger topological question: whether closed loops inside a decision region can be contracted without leaving that region. To this end, we propose an iterative quad-mesh filling procedure that constructs a finite-resolution label-preserving surface bounded by a given loop and lying entirely within the same decision region. We further connect this construction to natural Coons patches in order to quantify its deviation from a canonical geometric interpolation of the loop. By evaluating our method across several modern image-classification models, we provide empirical evidence supporting the hypothesis that decision regions in deep neural networks are not only path connected, but also simply connected.

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文通过提出迭代四边形网格填充程序，为深度神经网络决策区域的单连通性提供了经验证据。
analysis.problem: 研究图像分类器中决策区域的拓扑性质，特别是其是否具有单连通性（即区域内任何闭合环路能否连续收缩为一点）。
analysis.method: 提出一种迭代四边形网格填充程序，为给定环路构造有限分辨率的标签保持曲面，该曲面完全位于同一决策区域内，并通过Coons补片量化与标准几何插值的偏差。
contributions: 提出了一种验证决策区域单连通性的方法，即迭代四边形网格填充程序。
通过多个现代图像分类模型上的实验，提供了决策区域不仅路径连通而且单连通的实证证据。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法可能受限于有限分辨率，无法完全证明连续情况下的单连通性。
实验仅针对图像分类模型，可能不适用于其他类型网络。
analysis.relevance: 与可解释AI和深度学习理论相关，不直接涉及VLM、视频生成、医学影像或LLM训练。

papers.title: Continuous-Time Distribution Matching for Few-Step Diffusion Distillation
papers.abstract: Step distillation has become a leading technique for accelerating diffusion models, among which Distribution Matching Distillation (DMD) and Consistency Distillation are two representative paradigms. While consistency methods enforce self-consistency along the full PF-ODE trajectory to steer it toward the clean data manifold, vanilla DMD relies on sparse supervision at a few predefined discrete timesteps. This restricted discrete-time formulation and mode-seeking nature of the reverse KL divergence tends to exhibit visual artifacts and over-smoothed outputs, often necessitating complex auxiliary modules -- such as GANs or reward models -- to restore visual fidelity. In this work, we introduce Continuous-Time Distribution Matching (CDM), migrating the DMD framework from discrete anchoring to continuous optimization for the first time. CDM achieves this through two continuous-time designs. First, we replace the fixed discrete schedule with a dynamic continuous schedule of random length, so that distribution matching is enforced at arbitrary points along sampling trajectories rather than only at a few fixed anchors. Second, we propose a continuous-time alignment objective that performs active off-trajectory matching on latents extrapolated via the student's velocity field, improving generalization and preserving fine visual details. Extensive experiments on different architectures, including SD3-Medium and Longcat-Image, demonstrate that CDM provides highly competitive visual fidelity for few-step image generation without relying on complex auxiliary objectives. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出连续时间分布匹配（CDM）方法，将分布匹配蒸馏从离散时间步扩展到连续时间优化，以提升少步扩散模型的视觉保真度。
analysis.problem: 现有分布匹配蒸馏（DMD）方法仅在少数预定义离散时间步进行监督，导致视觉伪影和过度平滑输出，常需复杂辅助模块（如GAN或奖励模型）来恢复视觉质量。
analysis.method: CDM通过两种连续时间设计：1）用动态随机长度的连续调度替代固定离散调度，使分布匹配在采样轨迹的任意点而非固定锚点进行；2）提出连续时间对齐目标，在通过学生速度场外推的潜在表示上进行主动离轨迹匹配，改善泛化并保留细节。
contributions: 首次将分布匹配蒸馏从离散锚定迁移到连续时间优化
提出动态连续调度和连续时间对齐目标，无需复杂辅助模块即可提升少步生成的视觉保真度
analysis.experiments: 在SD3-Medium和Longcat-Image等不同架构上的实验表明，CDM在少步图像生成中提供了极具竞争力的视觉保真度，无需依赖复杂辅助目标。
limitations: 可能对连续时间调度的随机长度敏感，需要调参
未在视频生成或更大规模模型上验证
analysis.relevance: 与生成模型（尤其是扩散模型加速）相关，可应用于图像生成，对视频生成有潜在借鉴意义。

papers.title: eXplaining to Learn (eX2L): Regularization Using Contrastive Visual Explanation Pairs for Distribution Shifts
papers.abstract: Despite extensive research into mitigating distribution shifts, many existing algorithms yield inconsistent performance, often failing to outperform baseline Empirical Risk Minimization (ERM) across diverse scenarios. Furthermore, high algorithmic complexity frequently limits interpretability and offers only an indirect means of addressing spurious correlations. We propose eXplaining to Learn (eX2L): an interpretable, explanation-based framework that decorrelates confounding features from a classifier's latent representations during training. eX2L achieves this by penalizing the similarity between Grad-CAM activation maps generated by a primary label classifier and those from a concurrently trained confounder classifier. On the rigorous Spawrious Many-to-Many Hard Challenge benchmark, eX2L achieves an average accuracy (AA) of 82.24% +/- 3.87% and a worst-group accuracy (WGA) of 66.31% +/- 8.73%, outperforming the current state-of-the-art (SOTA) by 5.49% and 10.90%, respectively. Beyond its competitive performance, eX2L demonstrates that functional domain invariance can be achieved by explicitly decoupling label and nuisance attributes at the group level.

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出eX2L框架，通过对比解释惩罚解耦混淆特征，在分布偏移基准上超越当前最优。
analysis.problem: 现有分布偏移缓解方法性能不稳定且缺乏可解释性，难以直接处理虚假相关。
analysis.method: 在训练中惩罚主分类器与混淆分类器的Grad-CAM激活图相似性，实现特征解耦。
contributions: 提出基于解释的框架eX2L，通过对比解释对实现可解释的正则化
在Spawrious Many-to-Many Hard Challenge上以82.24%平均准确率和66.31%最差组准确率超越SOTA
analysis.experiments: 在Spawrious Many-to-Many Hard Challenge基准上，eX2L平均准确率82.24%±3.87%，最差组准确率66.31%±8.73%，分别超越SOTA 5.49%和10.90%。
limitations: 依赖Grad-CAM解释质量，可能受限于解释方法的准确性
需要同时训练两个分类器，计算开销可能较大
analysis.relevance: 与视觉-语言模型（VLM）的分布外泛化相关，可应用于提升VLM在虚假相关下的鲁棒性。

papers.title: SwiftI2V: Efficient High-Resolution Image-to-Video Generation via Conditional Segment-wise Generation
papers.abstract: High-resolution image-to-video (I2V) generation aims to synthesize realistic temporal dynamics while preserving fine-grained appearance details of the input image. At 2K resolution, it becomes extremely challenging, and existing solutions suffer from various weaknesses: 1) end-to-end models are often prohibitively expensive in memory and latency; 2) cascading low-resolution generation with a generic video super-resolution tends to hallucinate details and drift from input-specific local structures, since the super-resolution stage is not explicitly conditioned on the input image. To this end, we propose SwiftI2V, an efficient framework tailored for high-resolution I2V. Following the widely used two-stage design, it addresses the efficiency--fidelity dilemma by first generating a low-resolution motion reference to reduce token costs and ease the modeling burden, then performing a strongly image-conditioned 2K synthesis guided by the motion to recover input-faithful details with controlled overhead. Specifically, to make generation more scalable, SwiftI2V introduces Conditional Segment-wise Generation (CSG) to synthesize videos segment-by-segment with a bounded per-step token budget, and adopts bidirectional contextual interaction within each segment to improve cross-segment coherence and input fidelity. On VBench-I2V at 2K resolution, SwiftI2V achieves performance comparable to end-to-end baselines while reducing total GPU-time by 202x. Particularly, it enables practical 2K I2V generation on a single datacenter GPU (e.g., H800) or consumer GPU (e.g., RTX 4090).

analysis.one_sentence_summary: SwiftI2V提出了一种高效的图像到视频生成框架，通过条件分段生成实现2K分辨率视频合成，在保持输入图像细节的同时大幅降低计算成本。
analysis.problem: 高分辨率（2K）图像到视频生成面临内存和延迟开销巨大、级联超分辨率方法易产生伪影且偏离输入局部结构的问题。
analysis.method: 采用两阶段设计：首先生成低分辨率运动参考以降低令牌成本和建模负担，然后通过强图像条件化的2K合成恢复输入保真细节；引入条件分段生成（CSG）按段合成视频，每步令牌预算有限，并在段内进行双向上下文交互以提升跨段连贯性和输入保真度。
contributions: 提出SwiftI2V框架，在2K分辨率下实现与端到端基线相当的性能，同时将总GPU时间减少202倍。
引入条件分段生成（CSG）方法，通过分段合成和双向上下文交互实现高效高分辨率视频生成。
analysis.experiments: 在VBench-I2V基准上评估2K分辨率性能，与端到端基线相比GPU时间减少202倍，并能在单块数据中心GPU（如H800）或消费级GPU（如RTX 4090）上运行。
limitations: 可能依赖低分辨率运动参考的质量，若运动估计不准确可能影响最终效果。
分段生成可能引入段间不一致性，尽管双向交互有所缓解。
analysis.relevance: 属于视频生成方向，与视觉-语言模型（VLM）中的视频理解与生成任务相关。

papers.title: Earth-o1: A Grid-free Observation-native Atmospheric World Model
papers.abstract: Despite the unprecedented volume of multimodal data provided by modern Earth observation systems, our ability to model atmospheric dynamics remains constrained. Traditional modeling frameworks force heterogeneous measurements into predefined spatial grids, inherently limiting the full exploitation of raw sensor data and creating severe computational bottlenecks. Here we present Earth-o1, an observation-native atmospheric world model that overcomes these structural limitations. Rather than relying on conventional atmospheric dynamical modeling systems or traditional data assimilation, Earth-o1 directly learns the continuous, three-dimensional physical evolution of the Earth system from ungridded observational data. By integrating diverse sensor inputs into a unified, grid-free dynamical field, the model autonomously advances the atmospheric state in space and time. We show that this fundamentally distinct paradigm enables direct, real-time forecasting and cross-sensor inference without the overhead of explicit numerical solvers. In hindcast evaluations, Earth-o1 achieves surface forecast skill comparable to the operational Integrated Forecasting System (IFS). These results establish that continuous, observation-driven world models -- a new class of fully observation-native geophysical simulators -- can match the fidelity of established physical frameworks, providing a scalable data-driven foundation for a digital twin of the Earth.

analysis.one_sentence_summary: Earth-o1是一种无需网格的观测原生大气世界模型，直接从非网格观测数据学习连续三维物理演化，实现实时预测和跨传感器推理。
analysis.problem: 传统大气建模将异构观测数据强制映射到预定义网格，限制了原始传感器数据的充分利用并造成计算瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出观测原生（observation-native）的网格自由世界模型，直接从未网格化的观测数据学习地球系统的连续三维物理演化，集成多种传感器输入到统一的动态场中，无需显式数值求解器。
contributions: 提出一种全新的观测原生大气建模范式，避免传统网格化和数据同化步骤
实现实时预测和跨传感器推理，在回算评估中表面预报技能与业务化IFS相当
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对传感器覆盖稀疏区域表现不佳
模型可解释性可能不如传统物理模型
analysis.relevance: 与视频生成（时空动态建模）和VLM（多模态传感器融合）相关。

papers.title: TinyBayes: Closed-Form Bayesian Inference via Jacobi Prior for Real-Time Image Classification on Edge Devices
papers.abstract: Cocoa (Theobroma cacao) is a critical cash crop for millions of smallholder farmers in West Africa, where Cocoa Swollen Shoot Virus Disease (CSSVD) and anthracnose cause devastating yield losses. Automated disease detection from leaf images is essential for early intervention, yet deploying such systems in resource-constrained settings demands models that are small, fast, and require no internet connectivity. Existing edge-deployable plant disease systems rely on end-to-end deep learning without uncertainty quantification, while Bayesian methods for edge devices focus on hardware-level inference architectures rather than agricultural applications. We bridge this gap with TinyBayes, the first framework to combine a closed-form Bayesian classifier with a mobile-grade computer vision pipeline for crop disease detection. Our pipeline uses YOLOv8-Nano (5.9 MB) for lesion localisation, MobileNetV3-Small (3.5 MB) for feature extraction, and the Jacobi prior; a Bayesian method that provides a closed form non-iterative estimators via projection, for the classification. The Jacobi-DMR (Distributed Multinomial Regression) classifier adds only 13.5 KB to the pipeline, bringing the total model size within 9.5 MB, while achieving 78.7% accuracy on the Amini Cocoa Contamination Challenge dataset and enabling end-to-end CPU inference under 150 ms per image. We benchmark against seven classifiers including Random Forest, SVM, Ridge, Lasso, Elastic Net, XGBoost, and Jacobi-GP, and demonstrate that the Jacobi-DMR offers the best trade-off between accuracy, model size, and inference speed for edge deployment. We have proved the asymptotic equivalence and consistency, asymptotic normality and the bias correction of Jacobi-DMR. All data and codes are available here: this https URL

analysis.one_sentence_summary: TinyBayes提出了一种结合雅可比先验的闭式贝叶斯推理框架，用于在边缘设备上实现实时、轻量级的作物病害图像分类。
analysis.problem: 现有边缘可部署的植物病害检测系统缺乏不确定性量化，而贝叶斯方法多关注硬件推理架构而非农业应用，需要一种既小又快且无需联网的模型。
analysis.method: 使用YOLOv8-Nano进行病灶定位，MobileNetV3-Small提取特征，并采用雅可比先验的闭式非迭代贝叶斯分类器（Jacobi-DMR）进行分类。
contributions: 首个将闭式贝叶斯分类器与移动级计算机视觉流水线结合用于作物病害检测的框架
证明了Jacobi-DMR的渐近等价性、一致性、渐近正态性和偏差校正
在Amini Cocoa Contamination Challenge数据集上达到78.7%准确率，总模型大小9.5 MB，端到端CPU推理每张图像低于150 ms
analysis.experiments: 在Amini Cocoa Contamination Challenge数据集上，Jacobi-DMR分类器达到78.7%准确率，并与随机森林、SVM、Ridge、Lasso、Elastic Net、XGBoost和Jacobi-GP七种分类器进行了基准比较。
limitations: 仅针对可可病害检测，可能不直接适用于其他作物或病害
准确率78.7%可能不足以满足高精度要求
analysis.relevance: 与视觉-语言模型（VLM）和视频生成方向关系较弱，但涉及边缘设备上的轻量级视觉模型，与医学影像中的实时诊断有潜在关联。
analysis.sub_area: 边缘设备上的图像分类

papers.title: NavOne: One-Step Global Planning for Vision-Language Navigation on Top-Down Maps
papers.abstract: Existing Vision-Language Navigation (VLN) methods typically adopt an egocentric, step-by-step paradigm, which struggles with error accumulation and limits efficiency. While recent approaches attempt to leverage pre-built environment maps, they often rely on incrementally updating memory graphs or scoring discrete path proposals, which restricts continuous spatial reasoning and creates discrete bottlenecks. We propose Top-Down VLN (TD-VLN), reformulating navigation as a one-step global path planning problem on pre-built top-down maps, supported by our newly constructed R2R-TopDown dataset. To solve this, we introduce NavOne, a unified framework that directly predicts dense path probabilities over multi-modal maps in a single end-to-end forward pass. NavOne features a Top-Down Map Fuser for joint multi-modal map representation, and extends Attention Residuals for spatial-aware depth mixing. Extensive experiments on R2R-TopDown show that NavOne achieves state-of-the-art performance among map-based VLN methods, with a planning-stage speedup of 8x over existing map-based baselines and 80x over egocentric methods, enabling highly efficient global navigation.

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出NavOne框架，将视觉-语言导航重定义为在预构建俯视地图上的单步全局路径规划，实现高效全局导航。
analysis.problem: 现有视觉-语言导航方法采用逐步的自我中心范式，存在误差累积和效率低下的问题；基于地图的方法依赖增量更新或离散路径评分，限制了连续空间推理。
analysis.method: 提出Top-Down VLN范式，将导航转化为在预构建俯视地图上的单步全局路径规划；引入NavOne框架，通过端到端前向传播直接预测多模态地图上的密集路径概率，包含俯视地图融合器和注意力残差模块。
contributions: 提出TD-VLN范式，将VLN重定义为单步全局路径规划问题
构建R2R-TopDown数据集
提出NavOne框架，实现端到端密集路径概率预测
在规划阶段实现8倍于现有地图方法、80倍于自我中心方法的加速
analysis.experiments: 在R2R-TopDown数据集上，NavOne在基于地图的VLN方法中达到最优性能，规划阶段加速8倍（vs地图基线）和80倍（vs自我中心方法）。
limitations: 依赖预构建的俯视地图，可能不适用于未知环境
未提及在真实机器人上的部署验证
analysis.relevance: 与视觉-语言模型（VLM）相关，涉及多模态地图表示和空间推理。

papers.title: Render, Don't Decode: Weight-Space World Models with Latent Structural Disentanglement
papers.abstract: Training world models on vast quantities of unlabelled videos is a critical step toward fully autonomous intelligence. However, the prevailing paradigm of encoding raw pixels into opaque latent spaces and relying on heavy decoders for reconstruction leaves these models computationally expensive and uninterpretable. We address this problem by introducing NOVA, a world modelling framework that represents the system state as the weights and biases of an auxiliary coordinate-based implicit neural representation (INR). This structured representation is analytically rendered, which eliminates the decoder bottleneck while conferring compactness, portability, and zero-shot super-resolution. Furthermore, like most latent action models, NOVA can be distilled into a context-dependent video generator via an action-matching objective. Surprisingly, without resorting to auxiliary losses or adversarial objectives, NOVA can disentangle structural scene components such as background, foreground, and inter-frame motion, enabling users to edit either content or dynamics without compromising the other. We validate our framework on several challenging datasets, achieving strong controllable forecasting while operating on a single consumer GPU at $\sim$40M parameters. Ultimately, structured representations like INRs not only enhance our understanding of latent dynamics but also pave the way for immersive and customisable virtual experiences.

analysis.one_sentence_summary: NOVA 通过将系统状态表示为坐标基隐式神经网络的权重，实现了可解析渲染的世界模型，消除了解码器瓶颈并支持零样本超分辨率，同时无需额外损失即可解耦场景结构。
analysis.problem: 现有世界模型依赖编码像素到不透明潜空间和重型解码器，导致计算昂贵且不可解释。
analysis.method: 提出 NOVA 框架，使用辅助坐标基隐式神经网络（INR）的权重和偏置表示系统状态，通过解析渲染消除解码器瓶颈，并通过动作匹配目标蒸馏为视频生成器。
contributions: 提出基于 INR 权重的结构化状态表示，实现紧凑、可移植和零样本超分辨率的世界模型
无需辅助损失或对抗目标即可解耦背景、前景和帧间运动等结构成分
analysis.experiments: 在多个具有挑战性的数据集上验证，使用单个消费级 GPU（约40M参数）实现强可控预测。
limitations: 可能对复杂动态场景的建模能力有限
INR 表示的泛化性可能受限于训练数据分布
analysis.relevance: 与视频生成和视觉-语言模型（VLM）相关，因为世界模型是视频预测和可控生成的基础。

papers.title: Eulerian Motion Guidance: Robust Image Animation via Bidirectional Geometric Consistency
papers.abstract: Recent advancements in image animation have utilized diffusion models to breathe life into static images. However, existing controllable frameworks typically rely on Lagrangian motion guidance, where optical flow is estimated relative to the initial frame. This paper revisits the same optical-flow primitive through a more local supervision design: we use adjacent-frame Eulerian motion fields to guide generation, where the motion signal always describes a short temporal hop. This shift enables parallelized training and provides bounded-error supervision throughout the generation process. To mitigate the drift artifacts common in adjacent frame generation, we introduce a Bidirectional Geometric Consistency mechanism, which computes a forward-backward cycle check to mathematically identify and mask occluded regions, preventing the model from learning incorrect warping objectives. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach accelerates training, preserves temporal coherence, and reduces dynamic artifacts compared to reference-based baselines.

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于欧拉运动引导的图像动画方法，通过相邻帧运动场和双向几何一致性机制提升生成鲁棒性和效率。
analysis.problem: 现有图像动画方法依赖拉格朗日运动引导，存在训练效率低、误差累积和漂移伪影等问题。
analysis.method: 使用相邻帧欧拉运动场进行局部监督，并引入双向几何一致性机制，通过前向-后向循环检查识别并掩蔽遮挡区域，避免学习错误变形目标。
contributions: 提出欧拉运动引导框架，实现并行化训练和有界误差监督
设计双向几何一致性机制，有效缓解相邻帧生成中的漂移伪影
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对复杂运动或大位移场景的鲁棒性有限
双向一致性检查可能增加计算开销
analysis.relevance: 与视频生成方向相关，涉及运动引导和时序一致性。

papers.title: On-Orbit Real-Time Wildfire Detection Under On-Board Constraints
papers.abstract: We present a deployed system for on-orbit wildfire detection aboard a nine-satellite commercial thermal infrared constellation, operating under demanding joint constraints: sub-megabyte model footprint, sub-150 ms per-batch TensorRT FP16 inference on an NVIDIA Jetson Xavier NX, and an end-to-end alert pipeline targeting under 10 minutes from satellite overpass to fire event communication. The system operates on uncalibrated mid-wave infrared (MWIR) single-band imagery at 200 m ground sampling distance, where fires frequently appear as sub-pixel or single-pixel thermal anomalies under extreme class imbalance -- challenges not addressed by the contextual thermal-thresholding pipelines (MODIS, VIIRS) that currently dominate operational fire monitoring. We present an empirical study of lightweight dense representation learning for this regime using a proprietary nine-satellite MWIR dataset. We compare dense masked autoencoding (DenseMAE) and a hybrid DenseMAE+EMA (exponential moving average) distillation variant, and evaluate representations via linear probing and full-distribution pixel-level average precision (AP) under extreme class imbalance. DenseMAE pretraining enables compact downstream models on the latency-accuracy Pareto frontier: our fastest SSL-pretrained model achieves 0.640 test AP and 0.69 event-level Fire-F1 with 65.34 ms latency per batch and a 0.52 MB engine, without pruning or compression. The best configuration reaches 0.699 AP and 0.744 Fire-F1 below 1 MB, outperforming a supervised baseline (0.650 AP) under comparable constraints.

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种在轨实时野火检测系统，利用密集掩码自编码器预训练在极端类别不平衡下实现高精度低延迟检测。
analysis.problem: 在轨卫星上资源受限（模型小于1MB、推理延迟低于150ms、端到端小于10分钟）条件下，从单波段中波红外图像中检测亚像素或单像素野火热异常，现有阈值方法（如MODIS、VIIRS）无法处理极端类别不平衡。
analysis.method: 使用密集掩码自编码器（DenseMAE）及其混合DenseMAE+EMA蒸馏变体进行轻量级密集表示学习，通过线性探测和全分布像素级平均精度评估，在延迟-精度帕累托前沿上获得紧凑下游模型。
contributions: 首个在商业热红外卫星星座上部署的实时野火检测系统，满足严格星上约束
提出DenseMAE预训练方法，在极端类别不平衡下优于监督基线
实现最快模型65.34ms延迟、0.52MB引擎，达到0.640 AP和0.69 Fire-F1
analysis.experiments: 使用专有九卫星MWIR数据集，比较DenseMAE和DenseMAE+EMA蒸馏，通过线性探测和像素级AP评估。最佳配置低于1MB达到0.699 AP和0.744 Fire-F1，优于监督基线0.650 AP。
limitations: 仅使用单波段MWIR数据，未利用多光谱信息
未讨论模型在非火点异常（如工业热源）上的表现
analysis.relevance: 与视觉-语言模型（VLM）无关，但自监督预训练方法可迁移至其他遥感或医学图像异常检测任务

papers.title: Spark3R: Asymmetric Token Reduction Makes Fast Feed-Forward 3D Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Feed-forward 3D reconstruction models based on Vision Transformers can directly estimate scene geometry and camera poses from a small set of input images, but scaling them to video inputs with hundreds or thousands of frames remains challenging due to the quadratic cost of global attention layers. Recent token-merging methods accelerate these models by compressing the token sequence within the global attention layers, but they apply a uniform reduction to query tokens and key-value tokens, ignoring their functionally distinct roles in 3D reconstruction. In this work, we identify a key property of feed-forward 3D reconstruction models: query tokens encode view-specific geometric requests and are sensitive to compression, while key-value tokens represent shared scene context and tolerate aggressive compression. Guided by this insight, we propose Spark3R, a training-free acceleration framework that decouples the compression of query tokens and key-value tokens by assigning distinct reduction factors, with intra-group token merging applied to query tokens and lightweight token pruning to key-value tokens. Additionally, Spark3R adaptively adjusts the key-value reduction factor across layers, further improving the quality-efficiency trade-off. As a plug-and-play framework requiring no retraining, Spark3R integrates directly into multiple pretrained feed-forward 3D reconstruction models, including VGGT, $\pi^3$, and Depth-Anything-3, and achieves up to $28\times$ speedup on 1,000-frame inputs while maintaining competitive reconstruction quality.

analysis.one_sentence_summary: Spark3R提出了一种无需训练的非对称令牌缩减框架，通过区分查询令牌和键值令牌的压缩策略，显著加速前馈式3D重建模型。
analysis.problem: 基于Vision Transformer的前馈式3D重建模型在处理视频输入时，全局注意力层的二次复杂度导致计算成本过高，现有令牌合并方法对查询和键值令牌采用统一缩减，忽略了它们在3D重建中的不同作用。
analysis.method: 提出Spark3R，一种无需训练的加速框架，对查询令牌和键值令牌解耦压缩：查询令牌使用组内令牌合并，键值令牌使用轻量级令牌剪枝，并自适应调整各层的键值缩减因子。
contributions: 识别出前馈式3D重建模型中查询令牌对压缩敏感而键值令牌可容忍高压缩的关键特性
提出非对称令牌缩减框架Spark3R，实现高达28倍加速且保持重建质量
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果
limitations: 可能对极短序列或单视图输入效果有限
自适应缩减因子可能引入额外计算开销
analysis.relevance: 与视频生成相关，因为加速3D重建可提升视频输入的处理效率；与VLM关系较弱，但可应用于需要3D理解的视觉语言任务。

papers.title: ZScribbleSeg: A comprehensive segmentation framework with modeling of efficient annotation and maximization of scribble supervision
papers.abstract: Curating fully annotated datasets for medical image segmentation is labour-intensive and expertise-demanding. To alleviate this problem, prior studies have explored scribble annotations for weakly supervised segmentation. Existing solutions mainly compute losses on annotated areas and generate pseudo labels by propagating annotations to adjacent regions. However, these methods often suffer from inaccurate and unrealistic segmentations due to insufficient supervision and incomplete shape information. In contrast, we first investigate the principle of good scribble annotations, which leads to efficient scribble forms via supervision maximization and randomness simulation. We further introduce regularization terms to encode the spatial relationship and the shape constraints, where the EM algorithm is utilized to estimate the mixture ratios of label classes. These ratios are critical in identifying the unlabeled pixels for each class and correcting erroneous predictions, thus the accurate estimation lays the foundation for the incorporation of spatial prior. Finally, we integrate the efficient scribble supervision with the prior into a framework, referred to as ZScribbleSeg, and apply it to multiple scenarios. Leveraging only scribble annotations, ZScribbleSeg achieves competitive performance on six segmentation tasks including ACDC, MSCMRseg, BTCV, MyoPS, Decathlon-BrainTumor and Decathlon-Prostate. Our code will be released via this https URL .

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于高效涂鸦标注和最大化涂鸦监督的医学图像分割框架ZScribbleSeg，在六个分割任务上取得竞争性能。
analysis.problem: 医学图像分割需要大量精确标注，而现有弱监督涂鸦标注方法因监督不足和形状信息不完整导致分割不准确。
analysis.method: 首先研究良好涂鸦标注原则，通过监督最大化和随机模拟生成高效涂鸦形式；引入正则项编码空间关系和形状约束，利用EM算法估计标签类别的混合比例以识别未标注像素并纠正错误预测；将高效涂鸦监督与先验集成到框架中。
contributions: 提出高效涂鸦标注形式的设计原则，通过监督最大化和随机模拟生成。
引入基于EM算法的混合比例估计方法，有效利用空间先验纠正错误预测。
在六个医学图像分割任务上验证了仅用涂鸦标注即可达到竞争性能。
analysis.experiments: 在ACDC、MSCMRseg、BTCV、MyoPS、Decathlon-BrainTumor和Decathlon-Prostate六个分割任务上进行了实验，仅使用涂鸦标注即取得竞争性能。
limitations: 可能对复杂形状或边界模糊区域的分割效果有限。
EM算法估计混合比例可能对初始值敏感。
analysis.relevance: 与医学影像分割相关，涉及弱监督学习，与VLM/视频生成/LLM训练无直接关系。

papers.title: Look Beyond Saliency: Low-Attention Guided Dual Encoding for Video Semantic Search
papers.abstract: Video semantic search in densely crowded scenes remains a challenging task due to visual encoders tendency to prioritize salient foreground regions while neglecting contextually important, background areas. We propose an Inverse Attention Embedding mechanism that explicitly captures and highlights these overlooked regions. By combining inverse attention embeddings with traditional visual embeddings, our method significantly enhances semantic retrieval performance without additional training. Initial experiments and ablation studies demonstrate promising improvements over existing approaches in recall for video semantic search in crowded environments.

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出逆注意力嵌入机制，通过结合传统视觉嵌入与逆注意力嵌入，在不额外训练的情况下提升密集场景视频语义检索性能。
analysis.problem: 视频语义搜索在密集场景中因视觉编码器偏向显著前景区域而忽略背景信息，导致检索性能下降。
analysis.method: 提出逆注意力嵌入机制，显式捕获并突出被忽略的背景区域，并与传统视觉嵌入结合，无需额外训练即可增强语义检索。
contributions: 提出逆注意力嵌入机制，有效捕获被忽略的背景区域
无需额外训练即可提升密集场景视频语义检索的召回率
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在密集场景中有效，稀疏场景效果未知
逆注意力嵌入的生成可能依赖特定注意力机制，泛化性待验证
analysis.relevance: 与视频理解、视觉-语言模型中的注意力机制相关，可应用于视频检索任务。

papers.title: Differentiable Adaptive 4D Structured Illumination for Joint Capture of Shape and Reflectance
papers.abstract: We present a differentiable framework to adaptively compute 4D illumination conditions with respect to an object, for efficient, high-quality simultaneous acquisition of its shape and reflectance, with a unified spatial-angular structured light and a single camera. Using a simple histogram-based pixel-level probability model for depth and reflectance, we differentiably link the next illumination condition(s) with a loss that encourages the reduction in depth uncertainty. As new structured illumination is cast, corresponding image measurements are used to update the uncertainty at each pixel. Finally, a fine-tuning-based approach reconstructs the depth map and reflectance parameter maps, by minimizing the differences between all physical measurements and their simulated counterparts. The effectiveness of our framework is demonstrated on physical objects with wide variations in shape and appearance. Our depth results compare favorably with state-of-the-art techniques, while our reflectance results are comparable when validated against photographs.

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种可微分的自适应4D结构光框架，用于同时高效高质量地捕获物体的形状和反射率。
analysis.problem: 如何高效、高质量地同时获取物体的形状和反射率。
analysis.method: 使用基于直方图的像素级概率模型，可微地链接下一次照明条件与减少深度不确定性的损失，通过迭代更新不确定性，最后通过微调最小化物理测量与模拟的差异来重建深度图和反射率参数图。
contributions: 提出可微分的自适应4D照明条件计算框架
统一空间-角度结构光与单相机实现形状和反射率联合捕获
基于直方图的像素级概率模型用于深度和反射率不确定性估计
analysis.experiments: 在形状和外观变化广泛的物理物体上验证，深度结果优于现有技术，反射率结果与照片验证相当。
limitations: 可能依赖初始照明条件
对复杂反射率（如透明或高光）可能效果有限
analysis.relevance: 与视觉感知和3D重建相关，但与VLM/视频生成/医学影像/LLM训练等方向无直接关系。

papers.title: Taming the Entropy Cliff: Variable Codebook Size Quantization for Autoregressive Visual Generation
papers.abstract: Most discrete visual tokenizers rely on a default design: every position in the sequence shares the same codebook. Researchers try to scale the codebook size $K$ to get better reconstruction performance. Such a constant-codebook design hits a fundamental information-theoretic limit. We observe that the per-position conditional entropy of the training set decays so quickly along the sequence that, after a few positions, the conditional distribution becomes essentially deterministic. On ImageNet with $K=16384$, this happens within only 2 out of 256 positions, turning the remaining 254 into a memorization problem. We call this phenomenon the Entropy Cliff and formalize it with a simple expression: $t^{*} = \lceil \log_2 N / \log_2 K \rceil$. Interestingly, this phenomenon is not observed in language, as its natural structure keeps the effective entropy per position well below the codebook capacity. To address this, we propose Variable Codebook Size Quantization (VCQ), where the codebook size $K_t$ grows monotonically along the sequence from $K_{\min}=2$ to $K_{\max}$, leaving the loss function, parameter count, and AR training procedure unchanged. With a vanilla autoregressive Transformer and standard next-token prediction, a base version of VCQ reduces gFID w/o CFG from 27.98 to 14.80 on ImageNet $256\times256$ over the baseline. Scaled up, it reaches gFID 1.71 with 684M autoregressive parameters, without any extra training techniques such as semantic regularization or causal alignment. The extreme information bottleneck at $K_{\min}=2$ naturally induces a coarse-to-fine semantic hierarchy: a linear probe on only the first 10 tokens reaches 43.8% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet, compared to 27.1% for uniform codebooks. Ultimately, these results show that what matters is not only the total capacity of the codebook, but also how that capacity is distributed and organized.

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可变码本大小量化（VCQ）方法，通过沿序列单调增加码本大小来避免视觉自回归生成中的熵悬崖问题，显著提升生成质量并自然形成语义层次。
analysis.problem: 现有离散视觉分词器使用固定码本，导致序列中大部分位置的条件熵极低，码本容量浪费在记忆化而非有效建模，形成熵悬崖现象。
analysis.method: 提出可变码本大小量化（VCQ），让码本大小沿序列从K_min=2单调增长到K_max，保持损失函数、参数数量和自回归训练过程不变。
contributions: 发现并形式化了视觉自回归生成中的熵悬崖现象，给出简单表达式t* = ceil(log2 N / log2 K)。
提出VCQ方法，在不增加额外训练技巧的情况下，在ImageNet 256×256上将gFID从27.98降至14.80（基础版），缩放至684M参数时达到1.71。
揭示极端信息瓶颈（K_min=2）自然诱导出从粗到细的语义层次，仅用前10个token的线性探针即可达到43.8%的top-1准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet 256×256上使用标准自回归Transformer和下一个token预测，基础版VCQ将gFID（无CFG）从27.98降至14.80；缩放至684M参数时gFID达到1.71。
limitations: 方法仅在图像生成任务上验证，未在视频或语言模态上测试。
码本大小单调增长的策略可能不是最优的，需要进一步探索自适应分配。
analysis.relevance: 与视觉自回归生成模型密切相关，可应用于VLM中的视觉分词器设计，提升图像/视频生成质量。

papers.title: Bridging visual saliency and large language models for explainable deep learning in medical imaging
papers.abstract: The opaque nature of deep learning models remains a significant barrier to their clinical adoption in medical imaging. This paper presents a multimodal explainability framework that bridges the gap between convolutional neural network (CNN) predictions and clinically actionable insights for brain tumor classification, leveraging large language models (LLMs) to deliver human-interpretable diagnostic narratives. The proposed framework operates through three coupled stages. First, nine CNN architectures are extended with a dual-output hybrid formulation that simultaneously optimises a classification head and a segmentation head, enabling spatially richer feature learning. Second, visual saliency attribution methods, namely Grad-CAM, Grad-CAM++, and ScoreCAM, are applied to generate class-discriminative heatmaps, which are subsequently refined into binary tumor masks via an adaptive percentile thresholding pipeline. Third, the resulting masks are mapped onto the Harvard-Oxford cortical atlas to translate pixel-level evidence into named neuroanatomical structures, and the extracted findings are encoded into a structured JSON file that conditions three LLMs (Grok3, Mistral, and LLaMA) to generate coherent, radiological-style diagnostic reports. Evaluated on a dataset of 4,834 contrast-enhanced T1-weighted brain MRI images spanning three tumor classes, InceptionResNetV2 achieved the highest classification performance and Grad-CAM++ yielded the best segmentation overlap. Among the language models, Grok3 led in lexical diversity and coherence, while LLaMA achieved the highest readability score. By integrating visual, anatomical, and linguistic modalities into a unified pipeline, the framework produces explanations that are technically grounded and meaningfully interpretable, advancing the transparency and clinical accountability of artificial intelligence assisted brain tumor diagnosis.

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种多模态可解释性框架，结合CNN、视觉显著性方法和LLM，为脑肿瘤分类生成可解释的诊断报告。
analysis.problem: 深度学习模型在医学影像中的不透明性阻碍了临床采用，需要可解释的诊断工具。
analysis.method: 三阶段框架：1) 九种CNN架构扩展为双输出（分类+分割）；2) 应用Grad-CAM等方法生成热图并转为二值掩膜；3) 将掩膜映射到脑图谱，提取结构信息编码为JSON，驱动LLM生成放射学报告。
contributions: 提出结合视觉显著性和LLM的多模态可解释性框架
在脑肿瘤MRI数据集上验证了框架的有效性，InceptionResNetV2分类最优，Grad-CAM++分割最佳，Grok3在词汇多样性和连贯性上领先
analysis.experiments: 在包含4,834张增强T1加权脑MRI图像（三类肿瘤）的数据集上评估，报告了分类性能、分割重叠和语言模型指标。
limitations: 仅针对脑肿瘤分类，可能不直接适用于其他医学影像任务
依赖预定义的脑图谱，可能不适用于解剖结构变异的病例
analysis.relevance: 与视觉-语言模型（VLM）和医学影像分析相关，结合了CNN、视觉显著性方法和LLM生成文本报告。

papers.title: EA-WM: Event-Aware Generative World Model with Structured Kinematic-to-Visual Action Fields
papers.abstract: Pretrained video diffusion models provide powerful spatiotemporal generative priors, making them a natural foundation for robotic world models. While recent world-action models jointly optimize future videos and actions, they predominantly treat video generation as an auxiliary representation for policy learning. Consequently, they insufficiently explore the inverse problem: leveraging action signals to guide video synthesis, thereby often failing to preserve precise robot spatial geometry and fine-grained robot-object interaction dynamics in the generated rollouts. To bridge this gap, we present EA-WM, an Event-Aware Generative World Model that effectively closes the loop between kinematic control and visual perception. Rather than injecting joint or end-effector actions as abstract, low-dimensional tokens, EA-WM projects actions and kinematic states directly into the target camera view as Structured Kinematic-to-Visual Action Fields. To fully exploit this geometrically grounded representation, we introduce event-aware bidirectional fusion blocks that modulate cross-branch attention, capturing object state changes and interaction dynamics. Evaluated on the comprehensive WorldArena benchmark, EA-WM achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming existing baselines by a significant margin.

analysis.one_sentence_summary: EA-WM提出了一种事件感知的生成式世界模型，通过结构化运动到视觉的动作场将运动控制与视觉感知闭环，在机器人世界模型基准上取得最优性能。
analysis.problem: 现有世界-动作模型将视频生成仅作为策略学习的辅助表示，未能利用动作信号引导视频合成，导致生成结果中机器人空间几何和细粒度交互动态不精确。
analysis.method: 将动作和运动状态投影到目标相机视角形成结构化运动到视觉动作场，并引入事件感知双向融合模块调节跨分支注意力以捕捉对象状态变化和交互动态。
contributions: 提出结构化运动到视觉动作场，将动作信号直接映射到视觉空间以保持几何一致性
设计事件感知双向融合模块，增强对物体状态变化和交互动态的建模能力
analysis.experiments: 在WorldArena基准上评估，EA-WM显著优于现有基线，达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定相机视角和运动状态表示，泛化性需进一步验证
未提及在真实机器人场景中的部署效果和计算效率
analysis.relevance: 与视频生成和机器人世界模型相关，涉及视觉-语言模型中的动作与视觉融合。

papers.title: SuperFace: Preference-Aligned Facial Expression Estimation Beyond Pseudo Supervision
papers.abstract: Accurate facial estimation is crucial for realistic digital human animation, and ARKit blendshape coefficients offer an interpretable representation by mapping facial motions to semantic animation controls. However, learning high-quality ARKit coefficient prediction remains limited by the absence of reliable ground-truth supervision. Existing methods typically rely on capture software such as Live Link Face to provide pseudo labels, which may contain noisy activations, biased coefficient magnitudes, and missing or inaccurate facial actions. Consequently, models trained with supervised learning tend to reproduce imperfect pseudo labels rather than optimize for perceptual expression fidelity. In this paper, we propose SuperFace, a preference-driven framework that moves ARKit facial expression estimation from pseudo-label imitation toward human-aligned perceptual optimization. Instead of treating software-estimated coefficients as fixed ground truth, SuperFace uses them only as an initialization and further improves coefficient prediction through human preference feedback on rendered facial expressions. By aligning the model with perceptual judgments rather than numerical pseudo labels, SuperFace enables more visually faithful and expressive facial animation. Experiments show that SuperFace improves expression fidelity over Live Link Face supervision, demonstrating the effectiveness of preference-driven optimization for semantic facial action prediction.

analysis.one_sentence_summary: SuperFace 提出一种基于人类偏好优化的框架，将 ARKit 面部表情估计从伪标签模仿转向感知对齐，提升动画表情的真实性。
analysis.problem: 现有 ARKit 系数预测方法依赖 Live Link Face 等软件提供的伪标签，这些标签存在噪声、偏差和缺失，导致模型学习到不完美的伪标签而非优化感知表情保真度。
analysis.method: 提出 SuperFace 框架，将软件估计的系数仅作为初始化，通过人类对渲染面部表情的偏好反馈进一步优化系数预测，使模型与感知判断对齐。
contributions: 提出一种偏好驱动的 ARKit 面部表情估计框架，摆脱对伪标签的完全依赖
通过人类偏好反馈优化系数预测，提升表情保真度
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到实验表明 SuperFace 比 Live Link Face 监督方法提升了表情保真度，但未提供具体数值或数据集细节。
limitations: 依赖人类偏好反馈，可能引入标注成本
未讨论在极端表情或遮挡情况下的表现
analysis.relevance: 与视觉-语言模型（VLM）中的对齐方法相关，但主要面向数字人动画和面部表情估计。

papers.title: Retina-RAG: Retrieval-Augmented Vision-Language Modeling for Joint Retinal Diagnosis and Clinical Report Generation
papers.abstract: Diabetic Retinopathy (DR) is a leading cause of preventable blindness among working-age adults worldwide, yet most automated screening systems are limited to image-level classification and lack clinically structured reporting. We propose Retina-RAG, a low-cost modular framework that jointly performs DR severity grading, macular edema (ME) detection, and report generation. The architecture decouples a high-performance retinal classifier and a parameter-efficient vision-language model (Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct) adapted via Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), enabling flexible component integration. A retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) module injects curated ophthalmic knowledge together with structured classifier outputs at inference time to improve diagnostic consistency and reduce hallucinations. Retina-RAG achieves an F1-score of 0.731 for DR grading and 0.948 for ME detection, substantially outperforming zero-shot Qwen (0.096, 0.732) and MMed-RAG (0.541, 0.641) on a retinal disease detection dataset with captions. For report generation, Retina-RAG attains ROUGE-L 0.438 and SBERT similarity 0.884, exceeding all baselines. The full framework operates on a single consumer-grade GPU, demonstrating that clinically structured retinal AI can be achieved with modest computational resources.

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Retina-RAG，一种低成本的模块化框架，联合进行糖尿病视网膜病变分级、黄斑水肿检测和临床报告生成，在单个消费级GPU上运行。
analysis.problem: 现有自动化视网膜筛查系统仅限于图像级分类，缺乏临床结构化报告，且需要大量计算资源。
analysis.method: 将高性能视网膜分类器与通过LoRA适配的参数高效视觉语言模型（Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct）解耦，并在推理时通过检索增强生成模块注入精选眼科知识和结构化分类器输出。
contributions: 提出Retina-RAG框架，联合进行DR分级、ME检测和报告生成，具有低成本和模块化特点。
通过RAG模块注入眼科知识，提高诊断一致性并减少幻觉。
在单个消费级GPU上实现临床结构化视网膜AI，显著降低计算资源需求。
analysis.experiments: 在带有标题的视网膜疾病检测数据集上，Retina-RAG在DR分级上F1-score为0.731，ME检测上为0.948，显著优于零样本Qwen（0.096, 0.732）和MMed-RAG（0.541, 0.641）；报告生成上ROUGE-L为0.438，SBERT相似度为0.884，超过所有基线。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
RAG模块的知识库构建和维护可能增加额外成本。
analysis.relevance: 与视觉-语言模型（VLM）和医学影像分析相关，特别是检索增强生成在医学报告生成中的应用。

papers.title: DynT2I-Eval: A Dynamic Evaluation Framework for Text-to-Image Models
papers.abstract: Existing text-to-image (T2I) benchmarks largely rely on fixed prompt sets, leaving them vulnerable to overfitting and benchmark contamination once publicly released and repeatedly reused. In this work, we propose DynT2I-Eval, a fully automated dynamic evaluation framework for T2I models. It constructs a structured visual semantic space from long-form descriptions, decomposing prompts into controllable dimensions (e.g., subject, logical constraint, environment, and composition). This enables the continuous generation of fresh prompts via task-specific spaces and difficulty-aware sampling. DynT2I-Eval evaluates model performance across text alignment, perceptual quality, and aesthetics. Heterogeneous outputs are unified into prompt-conditioned pairwise comparisons, allowing a dynamic scheduler, micro-batch aggregation, and weighted Bayesian updates to maintain a stable online leaderboard despite changing prompt distributions and model injection. Experiments with independently sampled prompt streams demonstrate that continually refreshed prompts provide a robust evaluation protocol, reducing the impact of prompt-set-specific tuning. Simulations and ablations further confirm that the proposed ranking framework achieves a strong balance among cold-start convergence, late-entry discovery, and long-run ranking fidelity.

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个动态评估框架DynT2I-Eval，通过持续生成新提示和在线排行榜来缓解文本到图像模型的过拟合和基准污染问题。
analysis.problem: 现有文本到图像基准依赖固定提示集，容易导致过拟合和基准污染。
analysis.method: 从长描述构建结构化视觉语义空间，将提示分解为可控维度，通过任务特定空间和难度感知采样持续生成新提示；采用提示条件成对比较、动态调度器、微批聚合和加权贝叶斯更新维护在线排行榜。
contributions: 提出完全自动化的动态评估框架DynT2I-Eval，支持持续生成新提示。
设计基于成对比较和贝叶斯更新的在线排行榜，平衡冷启动收敛、后期发现和长期排名保真度。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到独立采样提示流的实验表明持续刷新提示提供了稳健的评估协议，模拟和消融验证了排名框架的平衡性。
limitations: 框架依赖长描述构建语义空间，可能不适用于简短提示。
动态排行榜的稳定性可能受提示分布变化影响。
analysis.relevance: 与视觉-语言模型（VLM）的评估相关，特别是文本到图像生成模型的基准测试。

papers.title: Beyond Forgetting in Continual Medical Image Segmentation: A Comprehensive Benchmark Study
papers.abstract: Continual learning (CL) is essential for deploying medical image segmentation models in clinical environments where imaging domains, anatomical targets, and diagnostic tasks evolve over time. However, continual segmentation still faces three main challenges. First, the scenarios for this task remain insufficiently standardized for real-world clinical settings. Second, existing research has been primarily focused on mitigating forgetting, overlooking the other essential properties such as plasticity. Third, a benchmark work with comprehensive evaluation on existing methods is stll desirable. To address these gaps, we present such benchmark study of continual medical image segmentation. We first define three clinically motivated scenarios, namely Domain-CL, Class-CL, and Organ-CL, to respectively capture the cross-center domain shift, the incremental anatomical structure segmentation, and the cross-organ segmentation. We then introduce an evaluation framework that measures not only general performance and forgetting, but also plasticity, forward generalizability, parameter efficiency, and replay burden. The results, from extensive experiments with representative CL methods, showed that it was still challenging to develop a model that could satisfy all the requirements simultaneously. Nevertheless, these studies also suggested that the replay-based methods achieve the best overall balance between stability and plasticity, the parameter-isolation methods should be effective at reducing forgetting, though at the cost of increased model size, and the forward generalizability remain a significantly understudied aspect of this research field. Finally, we discuss related learning paradigms and outline future directions for continual medical image segmentation.

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文提出了一个面向临床场景的持续医学图像分割基准研究，定义了三种场景并引入综合评估框架，实验表明重放方法在稳定性和可塑性之间取得最佳平衡。
analysis.problem: 持续医学图像分割中场景标准化不足、现有研究过度关注遗忘而忽视可塑性等关键属性、缺乏对现有方法的全面基准评估。
analysis.method: 定义三种临床场景（Domain-CL、Class-CL、Organ-CL），引入评估框架衡量通用性能、遗忘、可塑性、前向泛化性、参数效率和重放负担，并对代表性持续学习方法进行广泛实验。
contributions: 定义了三种临床驱动的持续分割场景，更贴近实际临床需求。
提出了一个综合评估框架，涵盖遗忘、可塑性、前向泛化性等多个维度。
通过大量实验揭示了现有方法的优缺点，并指出前向泛化性研究不足。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到对代表性持续学习方法进行了广泛实验，并给出了定性结论。
limitations: 可能未涵盖所有持续学习场景，如任务增量学习。
基准方法可能未包含最新或最先进的持续学习算法。
analysis.relevance: 与医学影像分析相关，特别是持续学习在医学图像分割中的应用。

papers.title: Learning Discrete Autoregressive Priors with Wasserstein Gradient Flow
papers.abstract: Discrete image tokenizers are commonly trained in two stages: first for reconstruction, and then with a prior model fitted to the frozen token sequences. This decoupling leaves the tokenizer unaware of the model that will later generate its tokens.
